_comment: Level definitions. The level itself is computed by pipeline/levels.py from indicator statuses — never stored, never model-chosen. ink: text color that sits on the level color fill.

levels.desc_zh: 例行軍演與言詞交鋒，屬長期背景噪音。目前沒有任何指標出現異常跡象。
levels.desc_en: Routine exercises and rhetoric — long-term background noise. No indicator currently shows unusual signs.
levels.trigger_zh: 例行軍演與言詞交鋒，屬長期背景噪音。
levels.trigger_en: Routine exercises and rhetoric — long-term background noise.
levels.do_zh: 知道這個網站存在就好。
chips_zh: 約定家庭緊急聯絡群組
chips_en: Agree on a family emergency chat

levels.desc_zh: 背景張力升高：演習與言詞警告增加，但尚未出現「撤離級」訊號——沒有任何國家撤離駐台使館眷屬，也沒有「勿前往」等級的旅遊警示。適合做低成本的預先準備。
levels.desc_en: Background tension is elevated: exercises and verbal warnings are up, but no evacuation-class signal has appeared — no country has withdrawn embassy dependents from Taipei, and no "do not travel" advisory is in effect. A good moment for low-cost preparation.
levels.trigger_zh: 演習規模／頻率異常，出現公開情報警告。
levels.trigger_en: Unusual exercise scale or tempo; public intelligence warnings appear.
levels.do_zh: 備妥證件、現金、藥品清單。

levels.desc_zh: 多項指標同時惡化，或出現無法用演習解釋的動員訊號（持續集結、後勤動員）。現在是完成所有準備的窗口。
levels.desc_en: Multiple indicators are deteriorating at once, or mobilization signals exercises can't explain (sustained buildup, logistics). This is the window to finish every preparation.
levels.trigger_zh: 持續性兵力集結獲多方證實，後勤動員跡象（如血漿儲備）。
levels.trigger_en: Sustained buildup confirmed by multiple sources; logistics mobilization signs (e.g., blood supplies).
levels.do_zh: 打包避難包，確認離境選項。
levels.do_en: Pack a go-bag; confirm exit options.

levels.desc_zh: 撤離級訊號已經出現：有政府開始縮編使館、撤離眷屬，或發布「勿前往」警示。烏克蘭經驗：此階段距開戰約一個月。
levels.desc_en: Evacuation-class signals have appeared: governments are drawing down embassies, withdrawing dependents, or issuing "do not travel" advisories. In Ukraine, war followed this stage by about a month.
levels.trigger_zh: 撤離級訊號：使館縮編、撤離眷屬、「勿前往」旅遊警示。
levels.trigger_en: Evacuation-class signals: embassy drawdowns, dependents withdrawn, "do not travel" advisories.
levels.do_zh: 非必要滯留者離境或移往低風險區。
levels.do_en: Leave if you can; relocate away from military targets.

levels.desc_zh: 使館關閉、最後通牒式警告——烏克蘭經驗：剩下不到兩週。立即執行你的計畫，不要再等待確認。
levels.desc_en: Embassies are closing; final warnings are issuing — in Ukraine, under two weeks remained. Execute your plan immediately; stop waiting for certainty.
levels.trigger_zh: 使館關閉、最後通牒式警告——烏克蘭經驗：剩下不到兩週。
levels.trigger_en: Embassies close; final warnings issue — in Ukraine, under two weeks remained.
levels.do_zh: 立即執行你的計畫，不再等待確認。
levels.do_en: Execute your plan immediately. Stop waiting for certainty.
chips_zh: 保持通訊與收音機暢通

rule_zh: 第 5 級：關閉使館，或兩項以上撤離級指標觸發 · 第 4 級：任一撤離級指標觸發 · 第 3 級：任一一般指標觸發，或四項以上出現跡象 · 第 2 級：任一指標出現跡象 · 第 1 級：其餘情況
rule_en: L5: embassies close, or 2+ evacuation-class triggered · L4: any evacuation-class triggered · L3: any other indicator triggered, or 4+ showing signs · L2: any indicator showing signs · L1: otherwise
